blended.narrative: Snoqualmie Pass is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 17 inches of snowfall of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,157 ft. Looking ahead, 46 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Friday: 19" of heavy snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 4.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 21".
